name_cn:
New Release🆕25s Spring/Summer Kelly Calfskin
Large Chain Handbag Black♥
Purchased from the counter for 37,500 RMB~
A viral item across the internet🔥Chain Kelly Handbag
Dominating the runway, simply stunning〰️
This season's update features delicate calfskin texture
Minimalist yet retro, the small handle feels comfortable
Cute and durable, truly impossible to put down!
Hardware: Thick 24k plated vintage gold
Material: Gaiera "Square Logo" calfskin
Size: 13*19*7 cm
